name: Profiteroles
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine boiling water and butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
2. Reduce heat to low and add flour, stirring vigorously until the mixture forms a ball.
3. Remove from heat and cool slightly.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating well until smooth and shiny.
5. Drop spoonfuls onto a greased cookie sheet about 1-1/2 inches apart.
6. Bake at 450°F for 20 minutes.
7. Reduce temperature to 370°F and bake an additional 15 minutes.
8. Allow to cool completely.
9. Cut off the top of each puff pastry.
10. Fill with vanilla ice cream and replace the tops.
11. Freeze until ready to serve.
12. Top with Creamy Chocolate Sauce before serving.
